summary: iter218 EchoYield v1.4 - Chafer volumetric, Forbes labels, Audit queue, CEY settings. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 9 tabs render correctly, Audit and Settings tabs fully functional with all required testids.
critical_code_review_comments: chafer.py: Well-structured NSF catalog with 20 items covering rectangular, round, oval, and roll-top shapes. Idempotent seed works correctly.
forbes_audit.py: Clean separation of forbes_router and audit_router with proper bundling via combined router for auto_register.
cey_settings.py: Proper MongoDB upsert with $setOnInsert for defaults, validation for photo_contribution_policy values.
EchoWastePanel.tsx: All 9 tabs implemented with correct data-testids. AuditQueueView and CEYSettingsView components properly integrated.
seed_data_creation: Chafer catalog seeded with 20 NSF standard items. Test audit items and forbes labels created during test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter218 fully tested. All new endpoints working: Chafer (seed-catalog, catalog, measure, measurements), Forbes labels (create, list, fuzzy search, validate, ingest-from-photo), Audit queue (enqueue, pending, get, resolve with all methods, banner stats), CEY settings (get, put with validation). Frontend EchoWaste panel accessible via EVENTS & CATERING sidebar section. All 9 tabs render: Capture Hub, Entries, Par Sheet, Daily Digest, Analysis Logs, Fingerprints, Atelier, Audit, Settings. Audit tab shows banner when >=threshold pending items, rows table with actions. Settings tab has 3 policy radios, 4 feature toggles, 3 timing inputs. Regression tests for iter216/217 fingerprint and photo-intake endpoints pass.

backend: TestChaferCatalog::test_list_catalog_all - PASS (count=20, correct fields per shape)
frontend: EchoWaste panel accessible via EVENTS & CATERING sidebar - PASS
9 tabs render (capture, entries, parsheet, digest, logs, fingerprints, atelier, audit, settings) - PASS
Audit tab: audit-queue-root, audit-banner, audit-refresh - PASS
Audit tab: rows table with actions (Label, Skip, Not food) - PASS
Settings tab: 3 policy radios (cey-policy-full, cey-policy-local_only, cey-policy-off) - PASS
Settings tab: 3 timing inputs (cey-banner-hour, cey-min-threshold, cey-expiry-days) - PASS

known_blockers: None. All iter218 features working correctly.
